summary: Full backend + frontend testing for Turonlimo MVP. All 18 backend pytest cases pass (public booking/contact, admin login/auth, bookings CRUD, contacts CRUD, stats, MongoDB _id exclusion). Frontend Home page loads with all sections, booking form submits successfully (verified success toast 'Reservation request received'), contact form submits successfully ('Message sent'). Admin login flow: /admin redirects to /admin/login when unauthenticated, wrong creds show error toast (401), correct creds navigate to /admin dashboard. Dashboard renders all 5 stat cards, bookings table with 3 rows, status update dropdown works ('Marked as confirmed' toast on Confirm action), delete confirmation AlertDialog displays correctly with Cancel/Delete buttons. Tab switching works. No critical issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') hooks — consider migrating to lifespan context manager (non-blocking, just deprecation warning).

CORS config: allow_origins is split from env CORS_ORIGINS which currently is '*'. Combined with allow_credentials=True this is technically invalid per CORS spec (browsers reject credentials with wildcard origin). Frontend uses Bearer token (not cookies) so it works, but should be tightened to explicit origin list before production.

Booking's pickup_date and pickup_time are accepted as raw strings without format validation (only frontend enforces 'yyyy-MM-dd' / 'HH:MM'). API consumers could submit malformed dates. Consider adding pydantic validators.
Admin DELETE booking returns generic {'deleted': True} (200). REST convention prefers 204 No Content, but this is non-blocking.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_-prefixed bookings and contact inquiries via API + UI. Lifecycle test cleans up after itself (delete). Some TEST bookings remain visible in dashboard from UI test run (3 bookings, 2 inquiries showing in stats).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_turonlimo_api.py covers all endpoints — run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_turonlimo_api.py -v. Frontend booking form uses shadcn Select (Radix) — interact via click trigger then page.get_by_role('option', name='X').click(force=True). Date is shadcn Calendar — query 'button[name="day"]:not([disabled])'. Admin token stored in localStorage 'turon_admin_token'. Note Radix Tabs unmount inactive content by default; when querying contact rows after switching tab, give 800ms+ for render and re-query.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All core flows work end-to-end.
